since_last: 43% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.69%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.41% · BTC -2.44% · Gold -1.37% · Nasdaq100 -0.06%. 43% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.69%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.69%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +8.86%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +8.86%, DELL +6.78%, BIDU +5.44%, SMCI +4.46%, VRT +4.43%. Laggards: PLTR -4.29%, NOW -3.70%, SAP -3.42%, DV -3.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.08% at $149.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
